Admin User
admin@3tabz.app

Settings

Platform configuration

20 Mar 2026

Feature Flags

Toggle platform features globally. Changes take effect immediately.

Broadcast Limits

Rate limiting for push notification broadcasts.

Admin Users

Manage dashboard access. All admins require TOTP 2FA.

IP Allowlist

Restrict dashboard access to specific IPs. Disabled = all IPs permitted.

Cron Schedule Configuration

Edit cron expressions and toggle individual jobs. Standard 5-field cron syntax.

Security Configuration

Current security settings — edit via environment variables.

JWT access token expiry15 minutes
Refresh token expiry30 days, rotation on use
Login rate limit5 attempts / 15 min / IP
AI endpoint rate limit20 requests / hour / user
Admin 2FATOTP enforced — all roles
Data deletion window30 days after request
Token reuse detectionEnabled — revokes all sessions
Body size limit10 KB
